content:
MODULE: cosmos.compliance.compliance_engine
FILE: cosmos/compliance/compliance_engine.py (878 lines)
CATEGORY: compliance

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Compliance Engine

"Every regulation must be followed to the letter...
 unless you have a bending unit to help you around them!"

Multi-framework compliance monitoring and enforcement.

CLASSES:
- ComplianceFramework(Enum): Supported compliance frameworks.
- ComplianceStatus(Enum): Compliance check status.
- ViolationSeverity(Enum): Violation severity levels.
- ComplianceCheck: A single compliance check.
- ComplianceViolation: A compliance violation.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> Dict
- CompliancePolicy: A compliance policy with multiple checks.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> Dict
- ComplianceEngine: Multi-framework compliance monitoring engine.

Features:
- SOC2, HIPAA, GDPR, PC
  Methods: def add_policy(self, policy: CompliancePolicy)
  Methods: def get_policy(self, policy_id: str) -> Optional[CompliancePolicy]
  Methods: def list_policies(self, framework: ComplianceFramework=None) -> List[CompliancePolicy]
  Methods: def load_policy_from_yaml(self, yaml_path: Path) -> Optional[CompliancePolicy]
  Methods: async def run_check(self, check: ComplianceCheck, context: Dict=None) -> ComplianceStatus
  Methods: async def run_policy_checks(self, policy_id: str, context: Dict=None) -> Dict[str, ComplianceStatus]
  Methods: async def run_all_checks(self, context: Dict=None) -> Dict[str, Dict[str, ComplianceStatus]]
  Methods: def register_check_handler(self, name: str, handler: Callable)
